prompt: Generate a network graph showing collaborations between two influencers(image 1, image2) and two brand(image 3, image4). Use each image as a node icon and connect them based on partnerships.
prompt_refined:
Generate a modern network graph designed as an information graphic. The graph should visually represent potential collaborations among the four provided entities.
Use each of the four conditioning images as distinct node icons within the graph.
Specifically, integrate image 1 (Chiara Ferragni, a female influencer) and image 2 (a male influencer) as individual nodes.
Integrate image 3 (a cosmetics brand logo) and image 4 (the Nike brand logo) as additional individual nodes.
Arrange these four nodes in a clear, well-spaced layout; place the influencer nodes (image 1 and image 2) on the left side of the graph and the brand nodes (image 3 and image 4) on the right side.
Connect these nodes with clean, straight lines or arrows to visually indicate hypothetical partnerships between them. The overall design should be crisp, minimalist, and highly legible, suitable for data visualization.
objects: Node icon representing Chiara Ferragni (from Image 1), on the left side
Node icon representing a male influencer (from Image 2), on the left side
Node icon representing a cosmetics brand logo (from Image 3), on the right side
Node icon representing the Nike brand logo (from Image 4), on the right side
